meaning: n.全音阶的长音阶第四音  (英国)足球协会 FA(Football Association)
examples: In fact, amateur sides can also play in the FA Cup.
Flight FA 320 from Beijing to Sydney is now boarding.
Usually, the teams that are very good at the Premiership will also be very good at the FA Cup.
The FA is postponing its action until the court proceedings are concluded early this year.
Now back at The Hawthorns, he was a substitute in the Baggies' FA Cup defeat by Reading.
